register.title: Downtown Dubai Oversupply
register.description: ~12,000 units in Downtown Dubai pipeline 2025–2027; branded residence premium of Address Boulevard partially insulates but broad market softness possible.

register.title: Hotel Management Fee Inflation
register.description: Emaar Hospitality service charges at AED 30/sqft/yr (~$6,800/yr) are high end; increases are passed directly to unit owners.

register.title: O&G Sector Tenant Departure
register.description: Tenant is energy sector consultant; departure risk if employer relocates or oil cycle turns; Downtown Dubai diverse tenant base supports rapid re-let.

register.title: Global Real Estate Capital Rotation
register.description: Institutional capital rotation away from Dubai could impact branded residence pricing; current cycle remains very positive.

scenarios.name: 30-Day Vacancy on Tenant Turnover (May 2027)
scenarios.verdict: Low impact — 30-day void at AED 172K/yr = AED 14,333 ($3,900 USD). Address Boulevard typically re-lets in 2–3 weeks at this price point.

scenarios.name: Supply Pressures — Rent Flat at Renewal
scenarios.verdict: Even flat renewal at AED 172K remains strong positive carry at 4.80% cap rate. Upside target AED 178K–185K. No base downside risk.

mitigationPlan.action: Monitor Dubai Marina 2025–2027 supply delivery; review pricing strategy 3 months before lease expiry
